message:
Fix clippy lints for nightly: collapsible_if, clone on Copy, vec_init_then_push

Address 8 clippy warnings that cause CI failure with -D warnings:

1. indexer/mod.rs: Collapse `if needs_rebuild { if let Some(p)...}` into
   single condition with `&&`

2. query.rs:193: Replace `fields.clone()` with `*fields` since Fields
   implements Copy trait (avoids unnecessary clone overhead)

3. query.rs:218: Collapse nested `if offset == 0 { if let Some(tx)...}`

4. query.rs:315: Use `vec![]` macro for term_shoulds initialization
   instead of Vec::new() followed by 4 push() calls

5. query.rs:626: Same vec![] pattern for warm worker's term_shoulds

6-8. tui.rs:1233,1248,1263: Collapse nested `if let` chains in
     render_inline_markdown_line() for bold/code/italic detection

Also fixed tui.rs:1279: Use `['*', '`']` array instead of closure
for find() (manual_pattern_char_comparison lint)

All changes use `let` chains (RFC 2497) available on nightly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
